ideal_must_detect.matched_text: an ACL change on the HR onboarding share permitted external VPN access for approximately 42 minutes

As an issuer on the Huadong Stock Exchange Growth Board, we assessed MNPI exposure and confirm no undisclosed operating metrics, financing arrangements, or trading plans were included; contents mirror publicly posted ESG training summaries.
Remediation by 09:56 CST included rollback of ACL, credential rotation, and log preservation; external hits accessed only the onboarding checklist and a generic cybersecurity awareness poster.

Under PIPL/CSL/DSL classification, the materials are ordinary business data; not important data or core data and not a personal information system.
